sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Supermicro Accelerates Deployment Times with New Gold Series Enterprise Server Solutions
feed.summary: Supermicro has launched new Gold Series enterprise server solutions designed to accelerate deployment times for customers. These pre-configured systems, optimized for a range of workloads including AI, compute, storage, and intelligent edge, are ready to ship within three business days, significantly shortening lead times. The Gold Series offers validated, workload-optimized configurations, making industry-leading server technology more quickly accessible to enterprises.

feed.title: TVA CEO Don Moul to retire July 1; Glasgow EPB power supplier faces leadership change
feed.summary: Don Moul, CEO of the Tennessee Valley Authority (TVA), the largest public utility in the U.S. and power supplier for Glasgow EPB, announced his retirement effective July 1. His decision follows public criticism from U.S. President Donald Trump, who also pushed for a significant pay cut for TVA executives, including a $500,000 compensation ceiling. The TVA board, largely appointed by Trump, is expected to quickly name Moul's successor.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics (NASDAQ:STLD) Updates Q1 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics (NASDAQ:STLD) has updated its Q1 2026 earnings per share guidance to $2.730-$2.770, which is below the consensus estimate of $3.220. Despite this, the company increased its quarterly dividend to $0.53 per share, representing an annualized yield of approximately 1.1%. The stock traded up 1.3% midday, reaching $189.97, with analysts maintaining a mixed "Hold" rating and an average price target of $182.44.

feed.title: Pool Corp will post quarterly results before markets open April 23
feed.summary: Pool Corporation (Nasdaq: POOL) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings results before the market opens on April 23, 2026. The company will also hold a conference call at 10:00 a.m. CT / 11:00 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results. A live webcast and replay of the call will be available on Pool Corp's website.

feed.title: TriSalus brings liver and uterine treatment data to SIR 2026
feed.summary: TriSalus Life Sciences (TLSI) will present new clinical and preclinical data at the 2026 Society of Interventional Radiology (SIR) Annual Scientific Meeting. The presentations will highlight the capabilities of its Pressure Enabled Drug Delivery (PEDD) platform for applications in liver-directed therapies and uterine artery embolization, demonstrating the platform's versatility in enhancing therapeutic delivery across various disease states. The company's CEO, Mary Szela, and CMO, Richard Marshall, emphasized the growing body of evidence supporting PEDD's potential to improve patient outcomes by enabling more effective delivery of therapies.

feed.title: $13M deal gives Transcat its first operational base in Latin America
feed.summary: Transcat, Inc. (Nasdaq: TRNS) has acquired SCM Metrology and Laboratories S.A. for approximately $13 million in cash, marking its first operational expansion into Latin America. This acquisition enhances Transcat's ability to serve multinational customers in highly regulated markets, particularly in medical device and life sciences, by providing a broader local service footprint and creating new distribution sales opportunities in Costa Rica. SCM brings over 20 years of experience and is an ISO/IEC 17025-accredited calibration laboratory, strengthening Transcat's global service capabilities.

feed.title: Wynn Resorts Announces First Quarter Earnings Release Date
feed.summary: Wynn Resorts, Limited (NASDAQ: WYNN) has announced that it will release its first quarter financial results for the period ending March 31, 2026, after the market closes on Thursday, May 7, 2026. This will be followed by a conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT (4:30 p.m. ET) to discuss the results. Interested parties can access the live broadcast via the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Wynn Resorts will report quarterly results after market close May 7
feed.summary: Wynn Resorts (NASDAQ: WYNN) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Thursday, May 7, 2026. A conference call will follow at 1:30 p.m. PT / 4:30 p.m. ET, accessible live and archived on the company's Investors site. Replay options via phone and webcast will be available through June 7, 2026.

feed.title: Expedia Group to Webcast First Quarter 2026 Results on May 7, 2026
feed.summary: Expedia Group announced it will webcast its first quarter 2026 results on Thursday, May 7, 2026. The earnings release will be available after market close, followed by a webcast at 1:30 PM Pacific Time / 4:30 PM Eastern Time, which will also be accessible for replay for about twelve months. All relevant information will be posted on the company's Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Titan America (TTAM) director acquires 5,849 shares from RSU vesting
feed.summary: Titan America SA director Van der Smissen Willem Jozef Ludwig acquired 5,849 common shares through the vesting of restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 31, 2026. This transaction converted 5,849 RSUs into an equal number of common shares at $0.00 per share, as part of his equity compensation. Following the vesting, the director directly holds 5,849 common shares, with no remaining RSUs from this specific grant.

feed.title: [Form 4] Titan America SA Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Titan America SA director William John Antholis acquired 5,849 shares of common stock through the vesting of restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 31, 2026. This transaction involved the conversion of RSUs into common stock on a one-for-one basis, with the common shares now held directly. The filing impact and sentiment are noted as "Neutral."

feed.title: Citizens hires PNC veteran to drive treasury growth in two regions
feed.summary: Citizens has hired Nicole Machiko, a former PNC executive with over a decade of experience, to lead treasury relationship sales. Machiko will be based in Pittsburgh and will oversee growth in the Mid-Atlantic and Midwest regions for Citizens.

feed.title: [Form 4] Titan America SA Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Titan America SA director Santos Sandra Maria Soares acquired 5,849 shares of common stock on March 31, 2026, through the vesting and exercise of restricted stock units (RSUs). Each RSU converted into one common share with no cash exercise price, resulting in her holding 5,849 common shares directly and having no remaining RSU balance from this grant. This transaction was filed as a neutral insider trading activity.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Has Lowered Expectations for Ivanhoe Electric (NYSEAMERICAN:IE) Stock Price
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for Ivanhoe Electric (NYSEAMERICAN:IE) from $22.00 to $21.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 62.84% from the current stock price. Despite insider selling by the CFO and VP, large institutional investors like Price T. Rowe, Alyeska, Vanguard, and State Street have been accumulating shares, increasing institutional ownership to 79.05%.

feed.title: ROSEN, A TOP-RANKED LAW FIRM, Encourages Enphase Energy, Inc. Investors with Losses in Excess ...
feed.summary: Rosen Law Firm is encouraging investors of Enphase Energy, Inc. who suffered losses during the Class Period of April 22, 2025, to October 28, 2025, to seek to become lead plaintiff by the April 20, 2026 deadline. The lawsuit alleges that Enphase made false and misleading statements regarding its ability to manage inventory and mitigate effects from a program termination. Investors are advised to select qualified counsel with a strong track record in securities class action litigation.

feed.title: iShares MSCI World ETF Draws Cash Despite Mounting Headwinds
feed.summary: Despite competitive fee disadvantages, looming political risk from drug tariffs impacting its healthcare sector, and structural changes like a potential SpaceX listing, the iShares MSCI World ETF attracted $500 million in five trading days. Its deep liquidity and brand recognition seem to outweigh concerns for large institutions. The fund faces significant portfolio turnover and increased US equity concentration due to a scheduled overhaul of MSCI's index methodology and SpaceX's inclusion, potentially amplifying existing vulnerabilities in its tech sector.

feed.title: HERBST GROUP, LLC's JPMorgan Equity Premium Income ETF(JEPI) Holding History
feed.summary: This article details HERBST GROUP, LLC's historical holdings of the JPMorgan Equity Premium Income ETF (JEPI). As of December 31, 2025, HERBST GROUP, LLC held 35,251 shares valued at $2.02 million, representing 1.19% of their portfolio. The firm has made 8 purchases and 6 sales of JEPI since Q3 2022, and currently has an estimated gain of $31,860.80 on these holdings.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Lowers Price Target for Tandem Diabetes Care (TNDM) to $25 | TNDM Stock News
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs analyst David Roman has lowered the price target for Tandem Diabetes Care (TNDM) from $28 to $25, while maintaining a 'Neutral' rating. This adjustment reflects a more conservative outlook despite recent upgrades from other analysts. The average target price from 21 analysts is $30.86, suggesting a potential upside of 55.73% from its current price, while GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $35.47, indicating a 79.01% upside.

feed.title: Take-Two (TTWO) Unveils Free-to-Play Mobile Game Test
feed.summary: Take-Two Interactive (TTWO) is expanding its "Borderlands" franchise with a new free-to-play mobile game, "Borderlands Mobile," developed by Zynga’s NaturalMotion and currently in a limited-time test for iOS users in the US. The company, which operates in the Interactive Media industry with a market cap of approximately $36.69 billion, shows mixed financial signals including profitability challenges and an Altman Z-Score indicating potential stress, alongside significant insider selling. Despite these concerns, analyst recommendations are generally positive, and institutional ownership is high, while valuation metrics suggest potential undervaluation.

feed.title: Medtronic (MDT) Analyst Rating: Evercore ISI Lowers Price Target to $106 | MDT Stock News
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has maintained its 'Outperform' rating for Medtronic (MDT) but lowered its price target from $108 to $106. This adjustment follows a trend of several analysts lowering price targets for MDT in April 2026, including Citigroup and Argus Research. Despite these adjustments, the average one-year price target from 27 analysts is $109.03, suggesting a 23.25% upside from the current price.

feed.title: CoStar Group stock hits 52-week low at 38.67 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: CoStar Group (CSGP) stock has fallen to a new 52-week low of $38.67, representing a 46% decrease over the past year due to market volatility and sector pressures. Despite the downturn, InvestingPro suggests the stock may be undervalued. Recent company developments include an expansion of Homes.com, a new board member, and the CEO's significant share purchase, which analysts view as a vote of confidence.

feed.title: There are real savings hiding in Home Depot’s Spring Black Friday sale
feed.summary: The Home Depot's Spring Black Friday sale is currently underway, offering discounts on over 1,000 items such as grills, lawn mowers, patio sets, and major appliances until April 29th. The article highlights specific deals including a Weber Genesis E-315 Gas Grill, a DEWALT self-propelled lawn mower, and a Halmuz 7-Piece Patio Furniture Set. It also addresses frequently asked questions regarding free shipping, appliance bundles, and the types of gear included in the sale.

feed.title: How Investors May Respond To TJX (TJX) Dividend Hike And New Share Repurchase Plan
feed.summary: TJX Companies announced a 13% increase in its quarterly dividend to US$0.48 per share and a new US$2.75 billion share repurchase authorization for Fiscal Year 2027. This move emphasizes the company's commitment to returning capital to shareholders and reinforces confidence in its business model, supported by recent earnings growth and solid margins. However, investors should also consider potential risks such as rising labor costs and increased competition from e-commerce before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Southwest, American raise bag fees amid escalating fuel prices
feed.summary: Southwest and American Airlines have increased their baggage fees, citing escalating fuel prices and the "evolving global backdrop" including the ongoing war in Iran. The article notes the impact on local carriers and refers readers to more information on the companies' strategies and financial situations.

feed.title: Frank Gentry, key leader in Bank of America's growth, dies at 83
feed.summary: Frank Gentry, a pivotal executive who contributed significantly to the growth of Bank of America and its predecessor, North Carolina National Bank, passed away on March 26 at the age of 83. His work was instrumental in the expansion that led to the 1998 merger creating the modern Bank of America.

feed.title: Texas Instruments (TXN) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TXN) shares rose 2.7% after Stifel Nicolaus upgraded the stock to a "Buy" with a $250 price target, citing the company reaching a turning point where heavy investments in new factories are expected to pay off. Analysts predict increased cash generation and margin growth as the building phase concludes and the company sells more specialized chips. This news follows a previous uptick due to a new government initiative aimed at securing semiconductor supply chains.

feed.title: TCOM Stockholders Have Rights – If You Lost Money Investing
feed.summary: Robbins LLP is reminding stockholders of Trip.com Group Limited (NASDAQ: TCOM) that a class action lawsuit has been filed on behalf of investors who purchased shares between April 30, 2025, and January 13, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Trip.com Group understated the regulatory risks associated with its monopolistic business practices, leading to a significant drop in stock price after news of an antitrust probe by China's State Administration for Market Regulation became public. Shareholders have until May 11, 2026, to submit their papers to the court to serve as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Taiwan Fund wins approval to drop its diversified-fund status
feed.summary: The Taiwan Fund, Inc. (TWN) announced the results of its Annual Stockholders Meeting, where shareholders re-elected four directors and approved a significant change in the fund's classification from diversified to non-diversified. This reclassification allows the fund to take more concentrated positions in Taiwanese equities, potentially impacting its risk profile and return strategy. The announcement follows recent updates focusing on portfolio performance, capital returns, and shareholder-friendly policies.

feed.title: TWST (NASDAQ: TWST) Form 144: 2,597 vested shares proposed for sale
feed.summary: Twist Bioscience Corp (NASDAQ: TWST) has filed a Form 144, indicating a proposed sale of 2,597 shares of Common Stock stemming from Restricted Stock Vesting dated April 8, 2026. This filing is a notice of intent to sell by an affiliate, not a confirmation of a completed transaction. The company also reported four previous sales totaling 15,823 shares by Adam Laponis between January and February 2026.

feed.title: Corning Stock Surges Past $170 on AI Fiber Optics Boom and Upgraded Growth Targets
feed.summary: Corning Inc. shares surged over 3% to trade around $170.30, driven by its critical role in providing high-density optical fiber solutions for AI data centers and hyperscale demand. The company has delivered approximately 89% year-to-date gains in 2026, solidifying its position in the tech supply chain amid accelerating AI infrastructure spending. Corning also announced a multiyear agreement with Meta Platforms valued at up to $6 billion and upgraded its Springboard growth plan, targeting an additional $11 billion in incremental annualized sales by the end of 2028.

feed.title: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Raises Stock Yards Bancorp (NASDAQ:SYBT) Price Target to $80.00
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods has raised its price target for Stock Yards Bancorp (NASDAQ:SYBT) from $79.00 to $80.00, maintaining a "market perform" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 12.08% from the current stock price. Analyst consensus on SYBT is generally a "Hold" with an average price target of $77.75, although some firms like Hovde Group have recently upgraded the stock to "Outperform."

feed.title: Autodesk Inc Stock (ADSK) Moved Down by 8.52% on Apr 9: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Autodesk Inc. (ADSK) stock fell by 8.52% due to a combination of accounting concerns, a valuation reset, and broader risk-off sentiment in the software sector. Analysts have reduced price targets for ADSK, influenced by past regulatory inquiries into the company's financial practices and an ongoing class action lawsuit regarding free cash flow metrics. Despite strong recent financial performance, these company-specific issues, along with macro factors, are contributing to investor caution.

feed.title: Autozone Inc Stock (AZO) Moved Up by 3.27% on Apr 9: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: AutoZone (AZO) stock rose 3.27% on April 9th, driven by a recent analyst upgrade and strong industry fundamentals. The company benefits from the increasing age of vehicles, boosting demand for auto parts. Despite some Q2 2026 financial challenges like margin compression and a revenue miss, analysts maintain a "Strong Buy" rating with positive future earnings projections.

feed.title: Oil Prices Could Surge Even if Hormuz Reopens, Warns Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley predicts that oil prices will average between $80 and $90 per barrel in 2026, even if the Strait of Hormuz reopens. The firm warns that normalization of oil and gas production after the strait reopens could take several months, leading to a prolonged supply shock and higher prices. If the closure is extended, oil could surge to $150-$180, while even an 80% traffic resumption could see prices at $100-$110.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil (XOM) Stock Reverses As Oil Rally Loses Steam
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil's stock initially rose due to Middle East tensions causing an oil price jump but reversed course as oil pared gains and market sentiment shifted away from an energy crisis. Despite the intraday pullback, the stock maintains a "Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $151.76. Threats to the Strait of Hormuz initially supported oil, but hopes of de-escalation between Lebanon and Israel cooled crude prices, leading to XOM's reversal.

feed.title: Ford removing Carroll Shelby’s name from streets near new HQ
feed.summary: Ford is reportedly removing Carroll Shelby's name from streets near its new headquarters, instead choosing to honor the Raptor. This move marks a change in how the company recognizes automotive figures in areas surrounding its facilities. The article highlights this decision without providing further details on the specific streets or reasons.

feed.title: nLIGHT, Corning, Allient, Bel Fuse, and Belden Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Several electronic components stocks, including nLIGHT (LASR), Corning (GLW), Allient (ALNT), Bel Fuse (BELFA), and Belden (BDC), saw gains in the afternoon session. This rally was attributed to news of a U.S.-Iran ceasefire, which reduced geopolitical tensions and improved the outlook for global supply chains and trade. The article notes the market's sensitivity to such news and highlights nLIGHT's volatility and year-to-date performance.

feed.title: IT Stockholders Have Rights – If You Lost Money Investing
feed.summary: Robbins LLP is reminding investors who purchased Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) common stock between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, about a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner misled investors regarding its growth and projected revenue, particularly concerning contract value (CV) growth rates and its Consulting segment's performance. The full truth reportedly emerged on February 3, 2026, leading to a significant drop in Gartner's stock price.

feed.title: Why Builders FirstSource (BLDR) Stock Is Up Today
feed.summary: Shares of Builders FirstSource (BLDR) rose by 2.9% due to increased optimism about a potential ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran, coupled with news of direct negotiations between Israel and Lebanon. This reduction in geopolitical tensions and a "risk-on" sentiment in the market helped stabilize broader market indices. A more stable geopolitical landscape is seen as reducing the risk of supply chain disruptions and lowering long-term borrowing costs, which is beneficial for the construction industry and demand for building materials.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has filed a preliminary pricing supplement for "Auto Callable Contingent Interest Notes" linked to the Russell 2000 and S&P 500 Indices, fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes are designed for investors seeking contingent interest payments if both indices meet specific performance criteria, with automatic early call features. Investing in these notes involves significant risks, including the potential loss of principal and dependence on the creditworthiness of both JPMorgan Financial and JPMorgan Chase & Co.

feed.title: HOTH.O PE Ratio & Valuation, Is HOTH.O Overvalued
feed.summary: This article provides a valuation analysis of Hoth Therapeutics Inc (HOTH.O), indicating that the stock is currently in the "Fair zone" based on its forward PS ratio compared to its five-year average. It details various valuation metrics, including Price-to-Book (P/B) ratio and Forward Free Cash Flow (FCF) yield, and compares its P/S ratio to competitors. The analysis suggests that while the stock is fairly valued, its premium given zero revenue growth may be unsustainable.

feed.title: United Community Banks (UCB) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
feed.summary: United Community Banks (UCB) stock rose 4.2% after Keefe, Bruyette & Woods upgraded its rating from 'market perform' to 'outperform' and increased its price target to $40 from $36. Despite the upgrade, the article notes the stock is not highly volatile, and the current move may not fundamentally alter its business perception. The improved outlook comes after a previous drop due to inflation concerns and credit risk worries, with UCB currently trading near its 52-week high.

feed.title: United Community Banks Shares Rise After Keefe Bruyette & Woods Upgrade
feed.summary: United Community Banks (UCB) saw its shares increase following an upgrade by Keefe Bruyette & Woods. The brokerage firm raised UCB's rating to Outperform from Market Perform and increased its price target to $40 from $36. This positive analyst action highlights a favorable outlook for the regional bank.

feed.title: EBIT per share of TherapeuticsMD, Inc. – MUN:29TA
feed.summary: This article displays information regarding the EBIT (Earnings Before Interest and Taxes) per share for TherapeuticsMD, Inc., traded on the Munich Stock Exchange under the symbol 29TA. It appears to be a financial data point from a trading platform, indicating the market is closed and no trades have occurred for this specific data point. The content does not provide detailed financial figures but rather serves as a label for where such data would typically be presented.

feed.title: Sitecore CEO: Marketing, content, experience AI prime focus
feed.summary: Sitecore CEO Eric Stine discusses the company's shift towards "agentic web" AI, focusing on how AI reshapes marketing tasks across discovery, connection, and conversion. Stine argues that AI is not an existential threat to software but rather the next evolution, emphasizing embedded AI in products and a consumption-based pricing model. He also posits that the current AI revolution, while impactful, is part of a continuous cycle of technological disruption rather than being magnitudes more disruptive than previous shifts like SaaS or cloud computing.

feed.title: TrumpRx adds more drugs as AbbVie, Genentech join self-pay platform
feed.summary: TrumpRx has expanded its offerings with the addition of branded medications from AbbVie and Genentech, bringing the total number of participating Big Pharma companies to eleven. This expansion includes key drugs like Humira and Xofluza, offered at significant discounts, and is part of the White House's effort to lower prescription drug costs for U.S. consumers. Many of these discounted drugs, however, have cheaper generic alternatives already available or can be found on existing discount sites.

feed.title: Form FWP TORONTO DOMINION BANK Filed by: TORONTO DOMINION BANK
feed.summary: The Toronto-Dominion Bank has filed a Form FWP for Market Linked Securities – Auto-Callable with Contingent Coupon and Contingent Downside Principal at Risk Securities, linked to the common stock of Broadcom Inc., due April 26, 2029. These securities offer contingent coupon payments and automatic call features, but investors face risks including potential loss of principal, no fixed interest payments, and full downside exposure to the underlying stock. The estimated value of the securities is expected to be less than the public offering price.

feed.title: Texas Instruments (TXN) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Texas Instruments (TXN) rose 3% after Stifel Nicolaus upgraded the stock to a "Buy" and increased its price target to $250, anticipating a turning point where heavy investments in new factories will boost cash generation and margins. The stock also benefited recently from a Trump administration plan to invest in semiconductor supply chains, reinforcing government support for the chip industry. Despite a slight cool-down from its initial jump, TXN is up 20.9% year-to-date and trading near its 52-week high.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics buys Texas Pacific Land (TPL) shares worth $1,347
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC recently purchased 3 shares of Texas Pacific Land Corp (TPL) for $1,347, bringing their direct ownership to over 3.4 million shares. Despite this acquisition, TPL's stock has declined, and InvestingPro suggests it is overvalued. The company, which boasts a 93% gross profit margin, recently reported Q4 2025 earnings that missed analyst expectations, although KeyBanc raised its price target to $639 due to significant opportunities in power generation and data centers.

feed.title: Occidental Petroleum Just Discovered Oil in an Exploratory Well Off the Gulf of America. Here Are 2 More Stocks That Could Soar as a Result.
feed.summary: Occidental Petroleum announced a significant oil discovery in an exploratory well at its Bandit site, located in the Gulf of America. This discovery is important as it could potentially be connected to existing facilities. Other companies, Chevron and Woodside Energy Group, also hold stakes in the Bandit project, suggesting they too could benefit from this find alongside Occidental.
